title:
What is a publisher account and how do I apply?
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
Government agencies can publish and update their datasets on the data.govt.nz catalogue by applying for a publisher account.
A publisher account allows you to add datasets to data.govt.nz, and edit existing datasets, and metadata , on behalf of your agency.
Data.govt.nz is the central catalogue of Government Open Data in New Zealand including data from:
- Local and regional Government
- Tertiary education institutions
Other data releasing organisations can also apply for a publisher account - contact us to discuss your needs.
To apply online, you will need to provide:
- the agency you will be publishing on behalf of
- your work email address
You will also need to agree to the Publisher Terms and Conditions and the General Terms and Conditions of using data.govt.nz
The team will confirm with you what kind of data you’ll be publishing, so we can tailor our guidance , before working with you to add and manage datasets on data.govt.nz.
If you need to publish and maintain your agencies data on data.govt.nz, and do not yet have a publisher account:
‘ Apply for publisher account ’
Once you have a publisher account, you’ll be able to login from the Publisher login link from the bottom of data.govt.nz.
